div.p: The Sample Label cannot be generated because there is no Lot/Serial Number assigned to this Manufacturing Order ().
Please assign a lot in the "Produced Lot/Serial Number" field before printing.

t.t:
^XA ^CI28 ^FX -- Report Size: A6 (rotated for your logic) -- ^PW812 ^LL1218
^CF0,70 ^FO730,30^A0R^FDSample for:^FS
^CF0,50 ^FO630,30^A0R^FDProduct Code: ^FS
^CF0,40 ^FO530,30^A0R^FDName: ^FS
^CF0,40 ^FO400,30^AbR^FH^FDBATCH: N/A^FS
^FO330,30^AbR^FH^FDBBD: (DD.MM.YYYY)^FS
^FO260,30^A0R^FDProduction ID: ^FS
^FO50,50^GB120,1120,3^FS
^CF0,50 ^FO80,80^AdR^FD^FS
^PQ1 ^XZ
